title: Wake Up Joe
description: Well, see. This Resourcepack turns the Goat into Joe Biden.
body:
In this Resourcepack, it turns the Minecraft Goat into Joe Biden himself! This replaces the texture for him with a [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) Compatable Skin.

Almost all of the sounds are avalible for the Screaming Goat varient, and much less for the default one.

I might edit the Resourcepack more at a later date, but just to finish the lines, but that probably wont happen.

Get [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) paired with [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)  by [LoudIris](https://x.com/loudiris) and [MrCheeze445](https://x.com/mrcheeze445) for **FORGE** or [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) for **FABRIC** for the best experience!

-Future Note.

I am absolutely shocked that anyone downloaded this stuff... WHY DID ANYONE GET THIS?
